microstructure_profile: graded precipitate and oxide-forming surface region
process_route: directed energy deposition or powder bed fusion with parameter/material transitions
known_strengths: surface oxidation resistance while retaining tougher core
known_watch_outs: composition control; cracking; heat treatment response; qualification complexity
applicability_guardrails: Treat as exploratory unless tied to a demonstrated alloy and process window.

zones: ductile core; transition; hard wear surface
composition_profile: increasing carbide or hard-phase fraction toward surface
microstructure_profile: hard surface with tougher lower-gradient support
process_route: directed energy deposition or hybrid additive repair
known_strengths: localized wear resistance with reduced bulk penalty
known_watch_outs: interface cracking; residual stress; machining and inspection complexity
applicability_guardrails: Use as a template concept only until wear, fatigue and residual stress evidence is available.

composition_profile: nominally similar chemistry with controlled surface hardening additions
microstructure_profile: core toughness with hardened surface case
process_route: additive build plus heat treatment or surface remelting
known_strengths: balances impact tolerance and surface durability
known_watch_outs: distortion; hard-zone cracking; property verification through depth
applicability_guardrails: Use only when through-thickness property verification is planned.

zones: load-bearing substrate; compliant transition; insulating surface
composition_profile: increasing ceramic and porosity fraction toward hot surface
microstructure_profile: graded thermal expansion and insulating outer region
process_route: multi-material additive manufacturing or hybrid coating-additive route
known_strengths: reduced thermal mismatch compared with abrupt coating interfaces
known_watch_outs: very low maturity; delamination; process repeatability; inspection gaps
applicability_guardrails: Template concept only; not a generated candidate and not certification ready.
